name: codex-notepad-librarian
description: A Windows-first Codex plugin that turns folder-based notes into an organized, searchable local memory library with portable Markdown artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Organize Notepad notes into searchable local memory.
interface.longDescription: A Windows-first Codex plugin that helps users write naturally in Notepad or plain folders while Codex processes .txt, .md, and OCR-pending PDF sources into searchable local memory with portable Markdown documents, review notes, preserved originals, and cited retrieval.
defaultPrompt: Find what I wrote about this topic.
Save this conversation to my Notepad library.
